transitions: opacity 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)

color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), text-decoration-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), fill 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), stroke 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)

color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), opacity 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1)

rules.cssText: .alert { grid-auto-flow: column; grid-template-columns: auto minmax(auto, 1fr); justify-items: start; text-align: start; }

rules.selector: .breadcrumbs > ol > li > a:hover, .breadcrumbs > ul > li > a:hover, .link-hover:hover
rules.cssText: .breadcrumbs > ol > li > a:hover, .breadcrumbs > ul > li > a:hover, .link-hover:hover { text-decoration-line: underline; }

.menu li > :not(ul):not(.menu-title):not(details).active, .menu li > :not(ul):not(.menu-title):not(details):active, .menu li > details > summary:active { --tw-bg-opacity: 1; background-color: var(--fallback-n,oklch(var(--n)/var(--tw-bg-opacity))); --tw-text-opacity: 1; color: var(--fallback-nc,oklch(var(--nc)/var(--tw-text-opacity))); }
.btn-link:hover { border-color: transparent; background-color: transparent; text-decoration-line: underline; }

.dropdown.dropdown-hover:hover .dropdown-content { --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x),var(--tw-translate-y)) rotate(var(--tw-rotate)) skewX(var(--tw-skew-x)) skewY(var(--tw-skew-y)) scaleX(var(--tw-scale-x)) scaleY(var(--tw-scale-y)); }

:where(.menu li:not(.menu-title):not(.disabled) > :not(ul):not(details):not(.menu-title)):not(.active):hover, :where(.menu li:not(.menu-title):not(.disabled) > details > summary:not(.menu-title)):not(.active):hover { cursor: pointer; outline: transparent solid 2px; outline-offset: 2px; }

.glass.btn-active { border: none; backdrop-filter: blur(var(--glass-blur,40px)); background-color: transparent; background-image: linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(255 255 255/var(--glass-opacity,30%)) 0,transparent 100%),linear-gradient(var(--glass-reflex-degree,100deg),rgb(255 255 255/var(--glass-reflex-opacity,10%)) 25%,transparent 25%); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgb(255 255 255/var(--glass-border-opacity,10%)) inset,0 0 0 2px rgb(0 0 0/5%); text-shadow: 0 1px rgb(0 0 0/var(--glass-text-shadow-opacity,5%)); }

.path:hover { fill: transparent; stroke: rgb(51, 51, 51); stroke-width: 1.5; stroke-dasharray: 70; stroke-dashoffset: 70; transition: fill 0.25s; animation: 1s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running dash; }
body { display: flex; flex-flow: column; font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); width: 100%; min-width: 768px; min-height: 100%; overflow-x: hidden; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn { position: relative; vertical-align: middle; font-style: normal; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background: rgb(51, 51, 51); transition: 0.1s linear; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; z-index: 0; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link > *, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn > *
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link > *, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn > * { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; margin-left: 5px; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn > :first-child
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn > :first-child { margin-left: 0px; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn::before
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn::before { content: ""; position: absolute; height: 42px; width: 42px; top: 50%; left: 50%; margin-left: -21px; margin-top: -21px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; transform-origin: center center; pointer-events: none; z-index: -1; opacity: 0; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link:active::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn:active::before
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link:active::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn:active::before { animation-name: ripple; animation-duration: 0.5s; animation-fill-mode: both; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); border-color: rgb(153, 153, 153); background: transparent; }

div#vtexIdUI-global-loader::before { content: ""; width: 25px; display: block; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; margin: -12.5px 0px 0px -12.5px; height: 25px; border-width: 4px; border-style: solid; border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255) transparent rgb(255, 255, 255) rgb(255, 255, 255); border-image: initial; box-sizing: initial; border-radius: 100%; transition: 0.3s; animation-name: spin; animation-duration: 2s; animation-iteration-count: infinite; animation-timing-function: linear; }
div.vtexIdUI { position: relative; border: 0px; border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: none; width: 440px; top: 50%; left: 50%; margin-left: 0px; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); transition: 0.5s; }
div.vtexIdUI a { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-decoration: underline; }
div.vtexIdUI h4 { margin: 0px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 32px; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-page.vtexIdUI-confirm-email div.modal-footer { padding: 0px 36px; max-width: 100%; height: fit-content; }

div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-page.vtexIdUI-auth-code .modal-body span, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-page.vtexIdUI-auth-code .modal-body strong { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-weight: 300; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-page.vtexIdUI-auth-code .modal-body #access-code { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); border-color: rgb(229, 229, 229); border-radius: 32px; font-weight: 300; width: 327px; }

div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-page.vtexIdUI-auth-code .modal-body .alert { width: 327px; margin: 0px auto; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 24px; color: rgb(254, 111, 102); text-align: left; padding: 0px 25px; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission span { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; display: block; margin-bottom: 10px; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission small { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; float: none; }
div.vtexIdUI .modal-header { background: transparent; border-bottom: 0px; position: static; padding: 0px 36px; }
div.vtexIdUI .modal-header .vtexIdUI-heading { text-align: left; width: auto; margin: 0px auto; font-size: 24px; line-height: 32px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }
div.vtexIdUI .modal-header .close { position: absolute; top: 25px; right: 25px; font-size: 0px; background: transparent; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-providers-list { display: flex; min-height: 250px; flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; gap: 25px; }
div.vtexIdUI .modal-body { position: relative; overflow-y: initial; padding: 36px 36px 0px; margin-bottom: 60px; }

div.vtexIdUI .modal-body .controls::after { display: none; content: url("data:image/png;base64,"); position: absolute; top: 22px; right: 6px; transform: translateY(-50%); }

div.vtexIdUI .modal-footer { display: flex; flex-flow: row; background: transparent; border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: none; border-top: 0px; align-items: flex-start; max-width: 366px; margin: 0px auto; height: 100px; padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 150px; }
div.vtexIdUI .modal-footer a, div.vtexIdUI .modal-footer button { height: 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: none; font-weight: 300; padding: 0px !important; }
div.vtexIdUI .btn, div.vtexIdUI button { padding: 0px; line-height: normal; }
div.vtexIdUI .btn { font-size: 16px; border-radius: 100px; box-shadow: none; height: 56px; font-weight: 300 !important; border: 1px solid rgb(229, 229, 229) !important; }

div.vtexIdUI #loginWithAccessKeyBtn { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-shadow: none; background-color: rgb(51, 51, 51); background-image: none; background-repeat: no-repeat; border-color: transparent; font-size: 0px; text-align: center; position: relative; width: 100%; }

div.vtexIdUI #loginWithAccessKeyBtn::before { content: ""; background-image: url("arquivos/icon-mail.png"); background-position: 50% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: cover; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 15px; height: 12px; width: 20px; transform: translateY(-50%); }
div.vtexIdUI #loginWithAccessKeyBtn::after { content: "Entrar apenas com e-mail"; font-size: 16px; }
div.vtexIdUI #loginWithUserAndPasswordBtn { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-weight: 700; }

div.vtexIdUI #loginWithUserAndPasswordBtn, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-my_custom_oauth, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-my_custom_oauth:hover { text-shadow: none; background-image: none; background-repeat: no-repeat; border-color: transparent; font-size: 16px; text-align: center; position: relative; width: 100%; }
div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-my_custom_oauth, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-my_custom_oauth:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgb(98, 163, 125); }

div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-google-plus, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-google-plus:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-shadow: none; background-color: rgb(227, 62, 43); background-image: none; background-repeat: no-repeat; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; border: 0px; text-align: center; position: relative; box-shadow: none; }

div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-google-plus::before, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-google-plus:hover::before { content: ""; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,"); background-position: 50% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: cover; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 15px; height: 15px; width: 14px; transform: translateY(-50%); }

div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-facebook, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-facebook:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-shadow: none; background-color: rgb(36, 98, 168); background-image: none; background-repeat: no-repeat; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; border: 0px; text-align: center; position: relative; box-shadow: none; }

div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-facebook::before, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-facebook:hover::before { content: ""; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,"); background-position: 50% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: cover; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 15px; height: 15px; width: 14px; transform: translateY(-50%); }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexid-icon-facebook, div.vtexIdUI .vtexid-icon-google-plus, div.vtexIdUI .vtexid-icon-lock, div.vtexIdUI .vtexid-icon-mail { display: none; }

div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn { flex: 0 0 0%; min-width: 60%; margin-left: auto; font-size: 0px; height: 56px; border-radius: 100px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #access-code, div.vtexIdUI #inputConfirmNewPassword, div.vtexIdUI #inputNewPassword, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="email"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="password"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="text"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-email-field input
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #access-code, div.vtexIdUI #inputConfirmNewPassword, div.vtexIdUI #inputNewPassword, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="email"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="password"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="text"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-email-field input { border-radius: 0px; border-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); box-shadow: none; margin-bottom: 0px; }

div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-email-field input { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; border-color: rgb(229, 229, 229); border-radius: 32px; height: 56px; padding: 0px 25px; font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif !important; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-email-field input::placeholder { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }

div.vtexIdUI .alert { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-weight: 300; color: rgb(255, 73, 24); font-size: 16px; text-shadow: none; border: 0px; border-radius: 0px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-align: center; padding: 8px 15px; }
div.vtexIdUI .alert[ng-show="blockedUser"]::before { content: "ops! vocÃª errou sua senha 4 vezes. Para sua seguranÃ§a, seu usuÃ¡rio foi bloqueado por 1 hora. volta daqui a pouco."; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link span { vertical-align: middle; transition: none; font-size: 16px; }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .modal-header h4 .vtexIdUI-heading::after { content: "entrar com o e-mail e senha"; font-size: 24px; }

div.vtexIdUI-classic-login-control input { border-radius: 32px !important; border-color: rgb(229, 229, 229) !important; color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; box-shadow: none !important; height: 56px !important; padding: 0px 25px !important; }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login-control input::placeholder { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; color: rgb(153, 153, 153); }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputPassword"] a { top: 10px; right: 0px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputEmail"] { font-size: 0px; position: absolute; z-index: 1; padding: 0px 8px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); left: 17px; top: 0px; }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputEmail"]::after { content: "seu e-mail"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputPassword"] { position: absolute; z-index: 1; padding: 0px 8px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); left: 17px; top: 0px; }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputPassword"] a, div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputPassword"] span { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputPassword"] a { position: absolute; width: fit-content; white-space: nowrap; top: 70px; left: 10px; font-size: 12px; text-decoration: none; }

div.vtexIdUI-change-pswd .modal-body .control-group .controls input { padding: 17px 25px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; border-color: rgb(229, 229, 229) !important; border-radius: 32px !important; }
div.vtexIdUI label { margin-bottom: 0px; padding: 10px 0px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); }

#vtexIdUI-form-classic-login .modal-body::before { content: "agora você precisa cadastrar uma nova senha"; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-weight: 300; font-size: 16px; display: block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 36px; }

#vtexIdUI-form-classic-login .control-group.vtexIdUI-classic-login-control > a.dead-link { position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 64px); text-align: center; display: inline-block; float: none; width: 100%; font-size: 16px; left: 0px; }

#vtexIdUI-form-classic-login .vtexIdUI input[type="email"]:focus, #vtexIdUI-form-classic-login .vtexIdUI input[type="password"]:focus, #vtexIdUI-form-classic-login .vtexIdUI input[type="text"]:focus { box-shadow: none; outline: none; }

rules.selector: blockquote, figure, h1, h2, h3, h4, ol, p, ul
rules.cssText: blockquote, figure, h1, h2, h3, h4, ol, p, ul { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }
fieldset, li, main, section { display: block; }
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-size: inherit; }
a, button { color: inherit; font-size: inherit; text-transform: inherit; }
button { overflow: visible; border: 0px; font: inherit; -webkit-font-smoothing: inherit; letter-spacing: inherit; background: none; cursor: pointer; }
button, input, select, textarea { appearance: none; }
body, html { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 100vh; transition: 0.3s linear; }
body { display: flex; min-width: 320px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; flex-flow: column; overflow-x: hidden; }

@font-face { font-family: alarm-clock; font-display: swap; src: url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/alarm_clock-webfont.woff2.css") format("woff2"), url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/alarm_clock-webfont.woff2.css") format("woff"); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; }

@font-face { font-family: farm-levis; src: url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/farm-levis.ttf.css?uwcl6v") format("truetype"), url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/farm-levis.woff.css?uwcl6v") format("woff"); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; font-display: block; }
@font-face { font-family: "Trade Gothic"; font-display: swap; src: url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/farm-levis-trade-gothic-book.OTF.css"); font-weight: 400; }
@font-face { font-family: "Trade Gothic"; font-display: swap; src: url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/farm-levis-trade-gothic-bold.OTF.css"); font-weight: 600; }
@font-face { font-family: "Trade Gothic Condensed"; font-display: swap; src: url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/farm-levis-trade-cond-book.OTF.css"); font-weight: 400; }
@font-face { font-family: "Trade Gothic Condensed"; font-display: swap; src: url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/farm-levis-trade-cond-bold.OTF.css"); font-weight: 600; }
@font-face { font-family: "Andrew Footit"; font-display: swap; src: url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/AndrewFootit-Modulus-Regular.ttf.css"); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; }
@font-face { font-family: "Andrew Footit"; font-display: swap; src: url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/AndrewFootit-Modulus-Medium.ttf.css"); font-weight: 500; font-style: normal; }
@font-face { font-family: "Andrew Footit"; font-display: swap; src: url("https://lojafarm.vtexassets.com/arquivos/AndrewFootit-Modulus-Bold.ttf.css"); font-weight: 600; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn { position: relative; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background: rgb(51, 51, 51); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0px; padding: 7.5px 20px; transition: 0.1s linear; appearance: none; overflow: hidden; user-select: none; cursor: pointer; z-index: 0; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link > *, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn > *
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn > *, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link > *, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn > * { display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle; margin-left: 7.5px; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn > :first-child
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link > :first-child, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn > :first-child { margin-left: 0px; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn::before
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn::before { content: ""; position: absolute; height: 42px; width: 42px; top: 50%; left: 50%; margin-left: -21px; margin-top: -21px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 50%; transform-origin: center center; pointer-events: none; z-index: -1; opacity: 0; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link:active::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn:active::before
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn:active::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link:active::before, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn:active::before { animation-name: ripple; animation-duration: 0.5s; animation-fill-mode: both; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); border-color: rgb(229, 229, 229); background: transparent; border-radius: 50px; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn:disabled, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn:disabled, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn:disabled, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn:disabled, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn:disabled, div.vtexIdUI .disabled#changePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI .disabled#confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI .disabled#sendAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI .disabled#tryChangePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI .disabled.vtexIdUI-back-link, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link:disabled div.vtexIdUI .disabled#classicLoginBtn, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn:disabled
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn:disabled, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn:disabled, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn:disabled, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn:disabled, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn:disabled, div.vtexIdUI .disabled#changePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI .disabled#confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI .disabled#sendAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI .disabled#tryChangePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI .disabled.vtexIdUI-back-link, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link:disabled div.vtexIdUI .disabled#classicLoginBtn, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission .btn:disabled { cursor: default; color: rgb(153, 153, 153) !important; border: 1px solid !important; background: none !important; }

div#vtexIdUI-global-loader::before { content: ""; width: 25px; display: block; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; margin: -12.5px 0px 0px -12.5px; height: 25px; border-width: 4px; border-style: solid; border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255) transparent rgb(255, 255, 255) rgb(255, 255, 255); border-image: initial; box-sizing: initial; border-radius: 100%; transition: 0.3s; animation-name: spin; animation-duration: 2s; animation-iteration-count: infinite; animation-timing-function: linear; }
div.vtexIdUI-shake { animation: 0.4s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal none running shake-2 !important; }
div.vtexIdUI { position: relative; border: 0px; border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: none; width: 440px; top: 50%; left: 50%; margin-left: 0px; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); transition: 0.5s; }
div.vtexIdUI a { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-decoration: underline; }
div.vtexIdUI h4 { margin: 0px; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 32px; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-page.vtexIdUI-confirm-email div.modal-footer { padding: 0px 36px; max-width: 100%; height: fit-content; }

div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-page.vtexIdUI-auth-code .modal-body span, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-page.vtexIdUI-auth-code .modal-body strong { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-weight: 300; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-page.vtexIdUI-auth-code .modal-body #access-code { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); border-color: rgb(229, 229, 229); border-radius: 32px; font-weight: 300; width: 327px; }

div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-page.vtexIdUI-auth-code .modal-body .alert { width: 327px; margin: 0px auto; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; line-height: 24px; color: rgb(254, 111, 102); text-align: left; padding: 0px 25px; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission span { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; display: block; margin-bottom: 10px; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-no-permission small { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; float: none; }
div.vtexIdUI .modal-header { background: transparent; border-bottom: 0px; position: static; padding: 0px 36px; }
div.vtexIdUI .modal-header .vtexIdUI-heading { text-align: left; width: auto; margin: 0px auto; font-size: 24px; line-height: 32px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }
div.vtexIdUI .modal-header .close { position: absolute; top: 25px; right: 25px; font-size: 0px; background: transparent; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-providers-list { display: flex; min-height: 250px; flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; gap: 25px; }
div.vtexIdUI .modal-body { position: relative; overflow-y: initial; padding: 36px 36px 0px; margin-bottom: 60px; }

div.vtexIdUI .modal-body .controls::after { display: none; content: url("data:image/png;base64,"); position: absolute; top: 22px; right: 6px; transform: translateY(-50%); }

div.vtexIdUI .modal-footer { display: flex; flex-flow: row; background: transparent; border-radius: 0px; box-shadow: none; border-top: 0px; align-items: flex-start; max-width: 366px; margin: 0px auto; height: 100px; padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 150px; }
div.vtexIdUI .modal-footer a, div.vtexIdUI .modal-footer button { height: 56px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: none; font-weight: 300; padding: 0px !important; }
div.vtexIdUI .btn, div.vtexIdUI button { padding: 0px; line-height: normal; }
div.vtexIdUI .btn { font-size: 16px; border-radius: 100px; box-shadow: none; height: 56px; font-weight: 300 !important; border: 1px solid rgb(229, 229, 229) !important; }

div.vtexIdUI #loginWithAccessKeyBtn { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-shadow: none; background-color: rgb(51, 51, 51); background-image: none; background-repeat: no-repeat; border-color: transparent; font-size: 0px; text-align: center; position: relative; width: 100%; }

div.vtexIdUI #loginWithAccessKeyBtn::before { content: ""; background-image: url("arquivos/icon-mail.png"); background-position: 50% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: cover; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 15px; height: 12px; width: 20px; transform: translateY(-50%); }
div.vtexIdUI #loginWithAccessKeyBtn::after { content: "Entrar apenas com e-mail"; font-size: 16px; }
div.vtexIdUI #loginWithUserAndPasswordBtn { color: rgb(51, 51, 51); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-weight: 700; }

div.vtexIdUI #loginWithUserAndPasswordBtn, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-my_custom_oauth, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-my_custom_oauth:hover { text-shadow: none; background-image: none; background-repeat: no-repeat; border-color: transparent; font-size: 16px; text-align: center; position: relative; width: 100%; }
div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-my_custom_oauth, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-my_custom_oauth:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgb(98, 163, 125); }

div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-google-plus, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-google-plus:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-shadow: none; background-color: rgb(227, 62, 43); background-image: none; background-repeat: no-repeat; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; border: 0px; text-align: center; position: relative; box-shadow: none; }

div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-google-plus::before, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-google-plus:hover::before { content: ""; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,"); background-position: 50% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: cover; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 15px; height: 15px; width: 14px; transform: translateY(-50%); }

div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-facebook, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-facebook:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-shadow: none; background-color: rgb(36, 98, 168); background-image: none; background-repeat: no-repeat; font-weight: 700; font-size: 16px; border: 0px; text-align: center; position: relative; box-shadow: none; }

div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-facebook::before, div.vtexIdUI #vtexIdUI-facebook:hover::before { content: ""; background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,"); background-position: 50% center; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: cover; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 15px; height: 15px; width: 14px; transform: translateY(-50%); }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexid-icon-facebook, div.vtexIdUI .vtexid-icon-google-plus, div.vtexIdUI .vtexid-icon-lock, div.vtexIdUI .vtexid-icon-mail { display: none; }

div.vtexIdUI #changePswdBtn, div.vtexIdUI #classicLoginBtn, div.vtexIdUI #confirmLoginAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #sendAccessKeyBtn, div.vtexIdUI #tryChangePswdBtn { flex: 0 0 0%; min-width: 60%; margin-left: auto; font-size: 0px; height: 56px; border-radius: 100px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }

rules.selector: div.vtexIdUI #access-code, div.vtexIdUI #inputConfirmNewPassword, div.vtexIdUI #inputNewPassword, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="email"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="password"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="text"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-email-field input
rules.cssText: div.vtexIdUI #access-code, div.vtexIdUI #inputConfirmNewPassword, div.vtexIdUI #inputNewPassword, div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="email"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="password"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI input[type="text"], div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-email-field input { border-radius: 0px; border-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); box-shadow: none; margin-bottom: 0px; }

div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-email-field input { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; border-color: rgb(229, 229, 229); border-radius: 32px; height: 56px; padding: 0px 25px; font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif !important; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-email-field input::placeholder { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }

div.vtexIdUI .alert { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-weight: 300; color: rgb(253, 72, 30); font-size: 16px; text-shadow: none; border: 0px; border-radius: 0px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-align: center; padding: 8px 15px; }
div.vtexIdUI .alert[ng-show="blockedUser"]::before { content: "ops! você errou sua senha 4 vezes. Para sua segurança, seu usuário foi bloqueado por 1 hora. volta daqui a pouco."; }
div.vtexIdUI .vtexIdUI-back-link span { vertical-align: middle; transition: none; font-size: 16px; }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .modal-header h4 .vtexIdUI-heading::after { content: "entrar com o e-mail e senha"; font-size: 24px; }

div.vtexIdUI-classic-login-control input { border-radius: 32px !important; border-color: rgb(229, 229, 229) !important; color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; box-shadow: none !important; height: 56px !important; padding: 0px 25px !important; }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login-control input::placeholder { font-family: Montserrat, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; color: rgb(153, 153, 153); }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputPassword"] a { top: 10px; right: 0px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputEmail"] { font-size: 0px; position: absolute; z-index: 1; padding: 0px 8px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); left: 17px; top: 0px; }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputEmail"]::after { content: "seu e-mail"; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputPassword"] { position: absolute; z-index: 1; padding: 0px 8px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); left: 17px; top: 0px; }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputPassword"] a, div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputPassword"] span { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 300; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); }
div.vtexIdUI-classic-login .control-label[for="inputPassword"] a { position: absolute; width: fit-content; white-space: nowrap; top: 70px; left: 10px; font-size: 12px; text-decoration: none; }

div.vtexIdUI-change-pswd .modal-body .control-group .controls input { padding: 17px 25px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; border-color: rgb(229, 229, 229) !important; border-radius: 32px !important; }
div.vtexIdUI label { margin-bottom: 0px; padding: 10px 0px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); }

#vtexIdUI-form-classic-login .modal-body::before { content: "agora você precisa cadastrar uma nova senha"; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-weight: 300; font-size: 16px; display: block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 36px; }

#vtexIdUI-form-classic-login .control-group.vtexIdUI-classic-login-control > a.dead-link { position: absolute; top: calc(100% + 64px); text-align: center; display: inline-block; float: none; width: 100%; font-size: 16px; left: 0px; }

#vtexIdUI-form-classic-login .vtexIdUI input[type="email"]:focus, #vtexIdUI-form-classic-login .vtexIdUI input[type="password"]:focus, #vtexIdUI-form-classic-login .vtexIdUI input[type="text"]:focus { box-shadow: none; outline: none; }
.ar-button-animation { display: flex; animation: 6s ease-in-out 0s 1 normal none running ar-button-desktop; }

.max-\[1023px\]\:-translate-x-1\/2, .max-\[1023px\]\:transform { transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x),var(--tw-translate-y)) rotate(var(--tw-rotate)) skewX(var(--tw-skew-x)) skewY(var(--tw-skew-y)) scaleX(var(--tw-scale-x)) scaleY(var(--tw-scale-y)); }
.md\:animate-none { animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; }

.md\:data-\[open\=false\]\:translate-y-0[data-open="false"] { --tw-translate-y: 0px; transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x),var(--tw-translate-y)) rotate(var(--tw-rotate)) skewX(var(--tw-skew-x)) skewY(var(--tw-skew-y)) scaleX(var(--tw-scale-x)) scaleY(var(--tw-scale-y)); }

.lg\:-translate-y-1\/2, .lg\:translate-x-full { transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x),var(--tw-translate-y)) rotate(var(--tw-rotate)) skewX(var(--tw-skew-x)) skewY(var(--tw-skew-y)) scaleX(var(--tw-scale-x)) scaleY(var(--tw-scale-y)); }

.lg\:translate-y-0 { --tw-translate-y: 0px; transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x),var(--tw-translate-y)) rotate(var(--tw-rotate)) skewX(var(--tw-skew-x)) skewY(var(--tw-skew-y)) scaleX(var(--tw-scale-x)) scaleY(var(--tw-scale-y)); }

.lg\:after\:rotate-45::after { content: var(--tw-content); --tw-rotate: 45deg; transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x),var(--tw-translate-y)) rotate(var(--tw-rotate)) skewX(var(--tw-skew-x)) skewY(var(--tw-skew-y)) scaleX(var(--tw-scale-x)) scaleY(var(--tw-scale-y)); }

.group:hover .lg\:group-hover\:translate-y-0 { --tw-translate-y: 0px; transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x),var(--tw-translate-y)) rotate(var(--tw-rotate)) skewX(var(--tw-skew-x)) skewY(var(--tw-skew-y)) scaleX(var(--tw-scale-x)) scaleY(var(--tw-scale-y)); }

.peer:checked ~ .lg\:peer-checked\:translate-x-0 { --tw-translate-x: 0px; transform: translate(var(--tw-translate-x),var(--tw-translate-y)) rotate(var(--tw-rotate)) skewX(var(--tw-skew-x)) skewY(var(--tw-skew-y)) scaleX(var(--tw-scale-x)) scaleY(var(--tw-scale-y)); }
.\32 xl\:space-x-\[50px\] > :not([hidden]) ~ :not([hidden]) { --tw-space-x-reverse: 0; margin-right: calc(50px*var(--tw-space-x-reverse)); margin-left: calc(50px*(1 - var(--tw-space-x-reverse))); }

[data-swal2-theme="auto"] { --swal2-dark-theme-black: #19191a; --swal2-dark-theme-white: #e1e1e1; --swal2-background: var(--swal2-dark-theme-black); --swal2-color: var(--swal2-dark-theme-white); --swal2-footer-border-color: #555; --swal2-input-background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--swal2-dark-theme-black), var(--swal2-dark-theme-white) 10%); --swal2-validation-message-background: color-mix( in srgb, var(--swal2-dark-theme-black), var(--swal2-dark-theme-white) 10% ); --swal2-validation-message-color: var(--swal2-dark-theme-white); --swal2-timer-progress-bar-background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); }

mediaQueries.condition: only screen and (min-width: 426px) and (max-width: 896px) and (orientation: landscape)

rules.cssText: #onetrust-banner-sdk.vertical-align-content #onetrust-button-group-parent { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 80%; transform: translateY(-50%); }
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container { top: 50%; margin: auto; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); position: absolute; padding: 0px; right: 0px; }
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container button { position: relative; margin: 0px; right: -22px; top: 2px; }
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container { top: 50%; margin: auto; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); position: absolute; right: 0px; }
#onetrust-banner-sdk.vertical-align-content #onetrust-button-group-parent { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 60%; transform: translateY(-50%); }

#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 #onetrust-policy-text, #onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 :not(.ot-dpd-desc) > .ot-b-addl-desc { margin-bottom: 1em; width: 50%; border-right: 1px solid rgb(216, 216, 216); padding-right: 1rem; }
#onetrust-banner-sdk.ot-iab-2 .ot-dpd-container { width: 45%; padding-left: 1rem; display: inline-block; float: none; }

#onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-pc-content.ot-button-order-container, #onetrust-pc-sdk.ot-ftr-stacked .ot-btn-container.ot-button-order-container { margin: 0px; width: 100%; padding: 0.5em 1em; flex-direction: column; box-sizing: border-box; height: calc(100% - 30px); justify-content: space-around; }
#onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-fltr-cnt { max-width: 320px; width: 90%; border-top-right-radius: 0px; border-bottom-right-radius: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 15px; left: auto; right: 40px; top: 85px; }

mediaQueries.condition: only screen and (max-width: 896px) and (max-height: 425px) and (orientation: landscape)

rules.cssText: #onetrust-pc-sdk.ot-shw-fltr #ot-fltr-cnt { margin: 0px; height: 100%; max-height: none; padding: 10px; top: 0px; width: calc(100% - 20px); position: absolute; right: 0px; left: 0px; max-width: none; }

rules.selector: .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) table, .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) thead, .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) tbody, .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) th, .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) td, .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) tr
rules.cssText: .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) table, .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) thead, .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) tbody, .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) th, .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) td, .ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) tr { display: block; }
.ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) thead tr { position: absolute; top: -9999px; left: -9999px; }

.ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) td { border-top: none; border-right: none; border-left: none; border-image: initial; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(238, 238, 238); position: relative; padding-left: 50%; }
.ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) td::before { position: absolute; height: 100%; left: 6px; width: 40%; padding-right: 10px; }

.ot-sdk-cookie-policy:not(#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2) .ot-mobile-border { display: inline-block; background-color: rgb(228, 228, 228); position: absolute; height: 100%; top: 0px; left: 45%; width: 2px; }
#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy table td { border-top: none; border-right: none; border-left: none; border-image: initial; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(215, 215, 215); }

rules.selector: #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy table, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy thead, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy tbody, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy th, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy td, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy tr
rules.cssText: #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy table, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy thead, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy tbody, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy th, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy td, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy tr { display: block; }
#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy thead tr { position: absolute; top: -9999px; left: -9999px; z-index: -9999; }
#ot-sdk-cookie-policy-v2.ot-sdk-cookie-policy table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(215, 215, 215); border-right: 0px; }

customProperties.--font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen-Sans, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
